discovery_domain: mixed-sign certificate-language search on the repaired verifier frontier
holdout_domain: the same 10 reachable quotient states over `(H6, E)` used in v24 and v25
strongest_claim: On the repaired verifier frontier, the smallest exact all-positive certificate language uses 7 pure guards, but the smallest exact mixed-sign language uses only 4 by certifying `safe`, `fail_13116`, and `fail_1915` positively and leaving `fail_828` as the default residual class.
